segments.original_text: この反撃を取ったことによって
アルセーヌを呼び出すことに成功

segments.text: and got his opponent slightly overcommitted!
segments.original_text: ザクレイをやや前のめりにさせて

full_text: Counter! By landing that counter, he successfully activated Arsene! and got his opponent slightly overcommitted!

corrections.corrected: アルセーヌを呼び出す
corrections.rule: misheard: R性能→アルセーヌ (Joker's Arsene)
